sqlMap.insert: insert into member(userid, pass, name, birth, phone, gender, zipcode, address) values(#userid#, #pass#, #name#, STR_TO_DATE(#birth#, '%m/%d/%Y'), #phone#, #gender#, #zipcode#, #address#)
sqlMap.select: select count(*) from member where userid=#userid#
select concat(a1, a2, a3, a4, a5, a6, a7, a8) as addr from post where a4 like concat('%', #dong#, '%') or a5 like concat('%', #dong#, '%')
select count(*) from member where userid=#userid# and pass=#pass#
